title: Al Munadi settings
description: Canonical shape of persisted user settings. Every platform must read/write a compatible structure (GNOME maps these onto GSettings keys, macOS onto UserDefaults). Loaders must normalize unknown or invalid values to the defaults instead of crashing.

mosque_url.description: Canonical Mawaqit mosque page URL, e.g. https://mawaqit.net/en/w/<slug>. Empty string means no mosque configured (first-run state).

language.description: Unknown values fall back to en.

adhan_path.description: Absolute path to a user-provided audio file. Apps never bundle adhan audio. Validate existence before playback; show adhan_file_missing if absent.

dnd_bypass.description: Global Do Not Disturb / Focus bypass. Platform-dependent best effort: Windows alarm-scenario toast, Linux urgency=critical, GNOME urgency, macOS currently NOT bypassing (time-sensitive entitlement disabled).

saved_mosques.description: Normalization drops entries without a url and removes duplicate urls (first occurrence wins).

prayer_notification_settings.description: Keys: Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha, Jumuah. Missing keys are filled with defaults.

reminder_minutes.description: Minutes before the prayer to fire a reminder. 0 disables the reminder. Invalid values normalize to 0.

adhan_enabled.description: Per-prayer override: true=always, false=never, null=follow global adhan_enabled.

dnd_bypass.description: Per-prayer override: true/false, null=follow global dnd_bypass.

prayer_offsets.description: Manual per-prayer corrections in minutes, clamped to [-60, 60]. Keys: Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha. Invalid values normalize to 0.
